property.name: note
property.value:
Overall Weather Looping event that controls Wind and Rain Intensity (Float/Cont. perameters).
Rain Intensity (Sounds stack up): 0 - 0.05 -> No rain 0.06 - 0.3 -> light rain 0.3 - 0.5 -> medium rain 0.55 - 1 -> Heavy rain
WindIntensity 0.0 - 0.2 -> light wind 0.25 - 0.5 -> medium wind 0.55 - 1 -> Strong unforgiving wind
Thunder: Off -> no thunder On -> Thunder spawns every now and then and takes big effect on the sound
